{{Quote|This is the world to which you Ewoks banished us.|The [[Stranger]], showing [[Logray/Legends|Logray]] the world with the [[Sunstar/Legends|Sunstar]]|<ref name="Night of the Stranger" />}}
The [[Wizard of the Night Spirit|wizards of the Night Spirit]] were banished<ref name="Night of the Stranger" /> to an extra-dimensional<ref name="Insider 27" /> '''world''' by the [[Ewok/Legends|Ewoks]] from the [[Endor/Legends|Forest Moon of Endor]]. The world was a devastated wasteland filled with bones of dead animals and no vegetation. They stayed there until they finally found a way back though the rip in space to [[Stranger War|attack Endor]]. However, the attack failed, and they were forced to return.<ref name="Night of the Stranger" />
